name: Wenley Tiny Home Plan - 16x54 Modern Backyard ADU | DIY Tiny House Plans (864 Sq Ft)
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture designed for backyard ADUs, larger lots, and highly flexible multi-room layouts.
Clean lines, standard framing, and straightforward roof geometry make Wenley approachable for experienced DIYers and efficient for professional builders.
Strategically placed doors and balanced windows maximize natural light, airflow, and functional zoning across the extended floor plan.
Horizontal wood siding, sleek trim accents, and a single-pitch lean-to roof create a modern-rustic aesthetic with lasting curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Wenley Tiny Home - a substantial 16x54 modern living and working space designed for comfort, efficiency, and clean architectural simplicity. With its extended length and generous width, Wenley offers near full-size home functionality while maintaining a sleek, contemporary profile ideal for backyard ADUs, guesthouses, and long-term living solutions.
